name: FF_FDI_USAGES
description: This table contains compiler-generated descriptions of database items used in a formula.

columns.Name: FORMULA_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier for the formula the data item usage belongs to. Foreign key to FF_FORMULAS.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: ITEM_NAME
columns.Comments: Name of the item the usage is for.

columns.Name: DATA_TYPE
columns.Comments: Data type of the formula data item.

columns.Name: USAGE
columns.Comments: Subtype field (D, L, I, O, B, U).

columns.Name: ITEM_GENERATED_NAME
columns.Comments: System generated bind variable for the item.

columns.Name: INDICATOR_VAR_NAME
columns.Comments: Generated bind variable that indicates whether or not a returned value is not null.

columns.Name: LOAD_WHEN_RUNNING
columns.Comments: Y or N flag that indicates whether item gets loaded at runtime.

columns.Name: ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: Usage-specific surrogate key for item.

columns.Name: ROUTE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier for database item route. Foreign key to FF_ROUTES.

columns.Name: USER_ENTITY_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier for database item user entity. Foreign key to FF_USER_ENTITIES.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Validity status. A status other than V means that the formula needs to be recompiled.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ENTERPRISES.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: COMPILE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier for the formula compile.

columns.Name: ORA_EDITION_CONTEXT
columns.Comments: Indicates the edition based redefinition (EBR) context to which the row belongs - either 'ALL', ''SET1' or 'SET2'.
